segments.text: WOMAN: Jack, I'm thinking of taking the kids to the seaside on a surfing holiday this summer and I wanted to ask your advice - as I know you're such an expert.
segments.translation: 女：杰克，我想今年夏天带孩子们去海边冲浪度假，我想寻求你的建议，因为我知道你这方面的专家。

segments.text: JACK: Well, I don't know about that, but yes, I've done a bit of surfing over the years.
segments.translation: 杰克：嗯，也说不上专家，但是，这些年来我做了一些冲浪运动。

segments.text: I'd thoroughly recommend it.
segments.translation: 我非常推荐这项运动。

segments.text: I think it's the kind of holiday all the family can enjoy together.
segments.translation: 我认为这是一种全家都可以一起享受的度假活动。

segments.text: The thing about surfing is that it's great for all ages and all abilities.
segments.translation: 冲浪的好处在于，它适合所有年龄段和所有能力的人。

segments.text: My youngest started when he was only three!
segments.translation: 我最小的儿子三岁就开始了！

segments.text: WOMAN: Wow! But it's quite physically demanding, isn't it?
segments.translation: 女：哇！但这对身体要求很高，不是吗？

segments.text: I've heard you need to be pretty fit.
segments.translation: 我听说玩儿的人需要非常健康。

segments.text: JACK: Yes. You'll certainly learn more quickly and won't tire as easily.
segments.translation: 杰克：是的。你肯定会学得更快，也不会那么容易疲劳。

segments.text: WOMAN: Well - that should be OK for us.
segments.translation: 女：嗯，那对我们来说应该没问题。

segments.text: You've been surfing a few times in Ireland, haven't you?
segments.translation: 你在爱尔兰冲浪过几次，不是吗？

segments.text: JACK: Yes. There's some great surfing there, which people don't always realise.
segments.translation: 杰克：是的。那里有很棒的冲浪活动，但人们并不总是能认识到这一点。

segments.text: WOMAN: And which locations would you recommend? - there seem to be quite a few.
segments.translation: 女：你会推荐哪些地点？似乎有不少地方可去。

segments.text: JACK: Yes, there are loads.
segments.translation: 杰克：是的，有很多。

segments.text: Last year we went to County Donegal.
segments.translation: 去年我们去了多尼格尔县。

segments.text: There are several great places to surf there.
segments.translation: 那里有几个冲浪的好去处。

segments.text: WOMAN: What about in County Clare?
segments.translation: 女：克莱尔县怎么样？

segments.text: I read that's also really good for surfing.
segments.translation: 我读到那里也很适合冲浪。

segments.text: JACK: Yes, it is. I've been there a few times.
segments.translation: 杰克：是的。我去过几次。

segments.text: Most people go to Lahinch.
segments.translation: 大多数人去拉欣奇。

segments.text: My kids love it there.
segments.translation: 我的孩子们喜欢那里。

segments.text: The waves aren't too challenging and the town is very lively.
segments.translation: 那里海浪没有太大的挑战性。镇上非常热闹。

segments.text: WOMAN: Are there good hotels there?
segments.translation: 女：那里有好酒店吗？

segments.text: JACK: Yes - some very nice ones and there are also a few basic hostels and campsites.
segments.translation: 杰克：是的，有些非常不错，还有一些基本的旅馆和露营地。

segments.text: It's great if you need lessons as the surf schools are excellent.
segments.translation: 如果你需要课程就太好了，因为当地的冲浪学校很棒。

segments.text: WOMAN: Sounds good.
segments.translation: 女：听起来不错。

segments.text: JACK: Yes and there's lots to see in the area - like those well-known cliffs - … I've forgotten the name of them …
segments.translation: 杰克：是的，这个地区有很多可看的地方，比如那些著名的悬崖……我忘了它们的名字了……

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh don't worry - I can look them up.
segments.translation: 女：哦，别担心，我可以查一下。

segments.text: JACK: I've also been surfing in County Mayo, which is less well-known for surfing, but we had a really good time.
segments.translation: 杰克：我也在梅奥县冲浪，那里并不是知名的冲浪地点，但我们玩得很开心。

segments.text: That was a few years ago when the kids were younger.
segments.translation: 那是几年前孩子们还小的时候。

segments.text: There's a good surf school at Carrowniskey beach.
segments.translation: 在卡洛尼斯基海滩有一所很好的冲浪学校。

segments.text: WOMAN: How do you spell that?
segments.translation: 女：怎么拼写？

segments.text: JACK: C-A-double R-O-W-N-I-S-K-E-Y
segments.translation: 杰克：C-A-double R-O-W-N-I-S-K-E-Y

segments.text: WOMAN: OK.
segments.translation: 女：好的。

segments.text: JACK: I put the kids into the surf camp they run during the summer for 10-16 year olds.
segments.translation: 杰克：夏季时，我让孩子们参加了他们为10-16岁的孩子们举办的冲浪夏令营。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh right. How long was that for?
segments.translation: 女：哦，这样。夏令营持续多长时间？

segments.text: JACK: Three hours every day for a week.
segments.translation: 杰克：为期一周，每天三小时。

segments.text: It was perfect - they were so tired out after that.
segments.translation: 那个夏令营太完美了。冲浪之后他们都很累了。

segments.text: WOMAN: I can imagine.
segments.translation: 女：肯定的。

segments.text: JACK: One thing we did while the kids were surfing was to rent some kayaks to have a look around the bay which is nearby.
segments.translation: 杰克：孩子们冲浪时，我们做了一件事，就是租了几艘皮划艇，去附近的海湾看看。

segments.text: It's really beautiful.
segments.translation: 真得很美。

segments.text: WOMAN: Oh, I'd love to do that.
segments.translation: 女：哦，我很乐意去看海。

segments.text: Now the only time I went to Ireland it rained practically every day.
segments.translation: 到现在我只去过爱尔兰一次，几乎每天都下雨。

segments.text: JACK: Mmm yes - that can be a problem - but you can surf in the rain, you know.
segments.translation: 杰克：嗯，是的，那可能是个问题，但你知道，你可以在雨中冲浪。

segments.text: WOMAN: It doesn't have the same appeal, somehow.
segments.translation: 女：不知怎么的，雨天冲浪没有那么有吸引力。

segments.text: JACK: Well, the weather's been fine the last couple of years when I've been there, but actually, it tends to rain more in August than in the spring or autumn.
segments.translation: 杰克：嗯，几年前我去那里的时候天气一直很好。但实际上，8月份的雨往往比春天或秋天多。

segments.text: September's my favourite month because the water is warmer then.
segments.translation: 九月是我最喜欢的月份，因为那时水比较暖和。

segments.text: WOMAN: The only problem is that the kids are back to school then.
segments.translation: 女：唯一的问题是孩子们那时已经回到学校了。

segments.text: JACK: I know. But one good thing about Irish summers is that it doesn't get too hot.
segments.translation: 杰克：我知道。但爱尔兰夏天有一个优点，那就是不会太热。

segments.text: The average temperature is about 19 degrees and it usually doesn't go above 25 degrees.
segments.translation: 平均温度约为19度，通常不会超过25度。

segments.text: WOMAN: That sounds alright. Now what about costs?
segments.translation: 女：听起来不错。那么花费呢？

segments.text: JACK: Surfing is a pretty cheap holiday really - the only cost is the hire of equipment.
segments.translation: 杰克：冲浪真的是一种相当便宜的假期方式，唯一的花费就是租用设备。

segments.text: You can expect to pay a daily rate of about 30 euros for the hire of a wetsuit and board - but you can save about 40 euros if you hire by the week.
segments.translation: 你可以预计每天支付约30欧元的费用来租用潜水衣和冲浪板，但如果你每周租用，你可以节省约40欧元。

segments.text: WOMAN: That's not too bad.
segments.translation: 女：还不错。

segments.text: JACK: No. It's important to make sure you get good quality wetsuits - you'll all get too cold if you don't.
segments.translation: 杰克：是的。重要的是要确保你有高质量的潜水衣。如果没有，会觉得太冷。

segments.text: And make sure you also get boots.
segments.translation: 还要确保你也有靴子。

segments.text: They keep your feet warm and it's easier to surf with them on too.
segments.translation: 它们能让你的脚保持温暖，而且穿着它们冲浪也更容易。

segments.text: WOMAN: OK. Well, thanks very much …
segments.translation: 女：好的。非常感谢……
